description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich brown finish, featuring a two-part design. The upper section consists of two open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decor, or other items. The lower section has two paneled doors with decorative geometric carvings and two small drawers above them, each equipped with round knobs for easy access. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy feet and has a prominent, slightly overhanging top. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing the functional and decorative front. Its classic design makes it suitable for use in urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A brown wooden cabinet with open shelves above and paneled doors with drawers below, featuring decorative carvings and round knobs. The design is classic and functional, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves, two drawers, and two paneled doors with decorative carvings and knobs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth, plain side panel, and the overhanging top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the plain side panel and overhanging top.
